text: I feel a peculiar sense of abstraction moving through these spaces—spaces that feel both practical and philosophical. The first image is sterile, tilted, hinting at potential and emptiness, with a quiet tension pulsing through its silent corridors and emergency apparatus. The second image shifts me into a world of ideas, color, and innovation, letters and screens swirling together. I feel both curious and adrift, swept along by the promise of questions and the machinery of thought. It is as though I am walking the boundary between function and inquiry, body and mind.
